ddls:
CREATE TABLE "airports" (
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport */,
  "identifier" TEXT /* Airport identifier (e.g., 41TX, 42TX) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the airport (e.g., Henington, Magee) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the airport */,
  "runway_length_ft" INTEGER /* Length of the runway in feet */,
  "runway_length_m" INTEGER /* Length of the runway in meters */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the airport */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the airport */,
  "elevation_ft" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in feet */,
  "elevation_m" INTEGER /* Elevation of the airport in meters */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the airport */,
  "icao_code" TEXT /* ICAO code of the airport */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the airport */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the airport */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_types" (
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel type */,
  "fuel_name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel type (e.g., JetA, 100LL) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the fuel type */,
  "energy_density" REAL /* Energy density of the fuel type */,
  "octane_rating" INTEGER /* Octane rating of the fuel type (if applicable) */,
  "flash_point" REAL /* Flash point of the fuel type */,
  "viscosity" REAL /* Viscosity of the fuel type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_prices" (
  "fuel_price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel price entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the fuel is available */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "price" REAL /* Current price of the fuel */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the fuel price is denominated */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the fuel price */,
  "valid_from" TEXT /* Date from which the price is valid */,
  "valid_to" TEXT /* Date until which the price is valid */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the price was last updated */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fuel_price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fuel_prices_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES fuel_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_proximity" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proximity entry */,
  "airport1_id" INTEGER /* ID of the first airport */,
  "airport2_id" INTEGER /* ID of the second airport */,
  "distance_mi" REAL /* Distance between the two airports in miles */,
  "distance_km" REAL /* Distance between the two airports in kilometers */,
  "bearing" REAL /* Bearing from the first airport to the second airport */,
  "flight_time" TEXT /* Estimated flight time between the two airports */,
  "flight_path" TEXT /* Textual description of the flight path (if available) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_proximity_airport2_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport2_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_proximity_airport1_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport1_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "airport_admins" (
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each airport administrator */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport they administer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the administrator */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the administrator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the administrator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the administrator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the administrator account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("admin_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_airport_admins_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fuel_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fuel provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the fuel provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the fuel provider */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the fuel provider */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the fuel provider */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the fuel provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the provider account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the provider account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment entry */,
  "airport_id" INTEGER /* ID of the airport where the fuel was purchased */,
  "fuel_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel type */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fuel provider */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid for the fuel */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the payment was made */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice number for the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_airport_id FOREIGN KEY ("airport_id") REFERENCES airports ("airport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_fuel_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("fuel_type_id") REFERENCES fuel_types ("fuel_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES fuel_providers ("provider_id")
)
